name: twg
description: Atlassian Teamwork Graph (TWG) CLI provides access to Atlassian's enterprise knowledge & context graph across all the Atlassian products (Jira, Confluence, JSM, Trello, Rovo, Loom, Assets, Goals, Projects), and your connected third-party data sources. Use it for giving context of your work, knowledge, people, and code to ChatGPT Work and Codex on your own machine (terminal, IDE, or desktop). Learn more: https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/twg-cli/. For Atlassian context in cloud or remote sandboxes, install the Atlassian Rovo MCP plugin. Run /twg-setup after installing this plugin to complete setup.

interface.shortDescription: Atlassian Teamwork Graph CLI for Jira, Confluence, and Atlassian context

defaultPrompt: Summarize my work during the past month.
What PRs are waiting on me, and which reviews are stale?
